tagline: Burbank's Trusted Auto Repair Experts Since Day One

hero.heading: Expert Auto Repair You Can Trust
hero.subheading: From brake jobs to full engine diagnostics, A & R Auto Repair keeps Burbank on the road with honest service, fair prices, and master-level craftsmanship.

about.heading: Why Burbank Trusts A & R
about.title: Why Burbank Trusts A & R
paragraphs: A & R Auto Repair has built its reputation one customer at a time. Located on South Glenoaks Boulevard, we specialize in brake repair, engine diagnostics, transmission service, and everything in between.
Our ASE-trained technicians treat every vehicle like their own — no shortcuts, no surprises. We believe in transparent pricing, clear communication, and getting it right the first time.
Whether you drive a daily commuter or a weekend cruiser, we have the tools and expertise to keep you moving.
about.description: A & R Auto Repair has built its reputation one customer at a time. Located on South Glenoaks Boulevard, we specialize in brake repair, engine diagnostics, transmission service, and everything in between. Our ASE-trained technicians treat every vehicle like their own — no shortcuts, no surprises. We believe in transparent pricing, clear communication, and getting it right the first time. Whether you drive a daily commuter or a weekend cruiser, we have the tools and expertise to keep you moving.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.description: Pads, rotors, calipers, and complete brake system overhauls to keep you stopping safely.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics
services.description: State-of-the-art OBD-II scanning and hands-on troubleshooting to pinpoint any issue.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Service
services.description: Conventional and synthetic oil changes plus coolant, transmission, and brake fluid flushes.

services.title: Transmission Service
services.description: Fluid changes, filter replacement, and complete transmission rebuilds for smooth shifting.

services.title: Suspension & Steering
services.description: Shocks, struts, tie rods, and alignment to restore your ride quality and handling.

services.title: A/C & Heating Repair
services.description: Refrigerant recharge, compressor replacement, and heater core service for year-round comfort.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: Best auto shop in Burbank, hands down. They fixed my brakes for half what the dealer quoted and the work was flawless.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Honest, fast, and affordable. Brought my car in for a weird noise and they diagnosed it within an hour. No upselling, just straight talk.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: I have been coming here for three years and never once felt like I was being taken advantage of. These guys are the real deal.

reviews.name: Jennifer T.
reviews.text: My transmission was slipping and they had it fixed in two days. The price was fair and they kept me updated the entire time.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Found this shop on Google and so glad I did. Five stars across the board — quality work, friendly staff, fair prices.
